description: Add a PRD library so readers can browse the PRDs that guided each feature, with a /prds index, detail pages that render markdown, and a home page teaser section.

userStories.title: PRD Index Page
userStories.description: As a reader, I want to browse PRDs so I can understand how features were planned.
acceptanceCriteria: A new /prds page lists PRDs as cards
Each PRD card shows title, date, and a short summary
Cards match the visual style of blog note cards
PRDs are sourced from tasks/prd-*.md files
Keyboard navigation (j/k/arrow keys + enter) works on PRD cards
Verify in browser using agent-browser skill

userStories.title: PRD Detail Page
userStories.description: As a reader, I want to open a PRD so I can read the full spec.
acceptanceCriteria: Each PRD has a detail page at /prds/[slug]
The page renders the PRD markdown content
The layout follows the blog post style (header, meta, body)
Verify in browser using agent-browser skill

userStories.title: Home Page PRD Section
userStories.description: As a reader, I want to discover PRDs from the home page so I can explore the planning artifacts.
acceptanceCriteria: The home page includes a PRD section with three cards matching the blog teaser style
Each card shows title, date, and short summary
Verify in browser using agent-browser skill
